reflection.summary: User attempted 3-level delegation hierarchy test using abelion_delegate tool, which failed due to missing agent context.
errors: abelion_delegate returned 'No agent context' — tool exists in registry but lacks runtime wiring in current session
lessons: Verify tool runtime availability before attempting delegation chains — tool presence in registry ≠ callable in current context
When a tool fails immediately, surface the error and offer a working alternative (delegate_task) rather than retrying the same broken path
Multi-level delegation tests require all tools in the chain to be context-ready before initiating
recommendations: Add a pre-flight check in the system prompt: before using any delegation tool, confirm it is wired into the current execution context
Document which tools require specific runtime context vs. which are universally callable, in the skill registry
Include delegate_task as the default delegation tool recommendation when abelion_delegate is unavailable
